meta.title: Common Language Practice
meta.subtitle: Choose Hindi, German, or Polish audio while keeping English visible on screen for easy practice.

decks.label: Hindi audio with English text
decks.subtitle: See both Hindi and English together, and play only the Hindi audio.

decks.label: German audio with English text
decks.subtitle: See both German and English together, and play only the German audio.

decks.label: Polish audio with English text
decks.subtitle: Keep the existing Polish deck available with English visible and Polish audio only.
